title: Runtime Directory Normalization
purpose: Consolidate checkpoint locations, delete empty runtime directories, and implement rotation policies for append-only streams.
architectural_constraints: Empty directories deleted or declared as staging in registry
All destructive actions emit governance events

deliverables.description: Canonical checkpoint location (consolidated from dual locations)
Rotation policy for audits, heartbeats, checkpoints, events

acceptance_criteria: project-governance/checkpoints/ merged into runtime/checkpoints/ or removed
19 empty/near-empty runtime directories deleted or populated
runtime/audits/ rotation policy enforced (<= 30 days retained)
Directory tree matches proposed canonical structure
No stale checkpoint duplicates with divergent content

traceability.description: Normalized runtime directories: merged duplicate checkpoint location, archived 8 old per-ticket checkpoints, populated 11 empty directories with .gitkeep, created retention-policy.json with 7 rotation rules.

failure_modes.scenario: Deleting empty directory breaks test runner that expects it
failure_modes.mitigation: Update test setup to create directory if missing
